title: EvaluateRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v1-evaluate. Read by atlasent-api/supabase/functions/v1-evaluate/handler.ts. Top-level fields are flat; `context` is an opaque record passed verbatim to the rule engine. The legacy {action, agent, api_key} shape is no longer canonical — SDKs may accept it as input for backward-compat with a deprecation warning, but MUST always serialize to the wire shape described here.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the calling actor / agent (e.g. 'clinical-data-agent').

context.description: Arbitrary policy context (environment, approvals, change_window, resource IDs). Values MUST be JSON-serializable. Defaults to {} if omitted.

request_id.description: Idempotency key. Repeat calls with the same request_id replay the original decision.

shadow.description: When true, evaluation runs but no permit is issued (mode='shadow'). Used for policy testing.

explain.description: When true, the response includes the rule-engine trace under `decisionObject.explanation`.

traceparent.description: W3C Trace Context fallback when the SDK can't add the header through a signing layer.
